releaseNotes: v0.26.0 — Three intake-workflow features. (1) NDC package-size enrichment: when RxRescue looks up a drug by its NDC it now also pulls the package size — e.g. '100 tablets' or '30 mL' — and shows it on the dashboard and edit-bottle dialog, carried through CSV import and export. (2) Receive-date capture: every bottle now records the date it was received into stock, separate from the expiration date, captured at intake (scan and manual entry), editable in the edit-bottle dialog, and included in CSV round-trips. (3) Near-expiry-at-intake alert: if a scanned or entered bottle's expiration already falls inside the near-expiry window, RxRescue alerts right away so a short-dated bottle can be quarantined or refused at receiving instead of on a later sweep. Local database schema moves to v18; existing inventory upgrades automatically. 471 tests passing.
